title: Microsoft Office Home and Business 2024 vs Microsoft Office Professional Plus 2024: What are the differences?
summary: While Office Home and Business 2024 and Office Business and Professional Plus 2024 have much in common, they target different audiences. Office Home and Business 2024 has a simpler installation process.
